title: ID Fresh Food is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: ID Fresh Food is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
